title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 150.220 - Certify to director of revenue amount charged to county collector
text:
150.220.  Certify to director of revenue amount charged to county collector. — The commission, in ascertaining the amount received by the collector for licenses and taxes, on or for which he shall have become chargeable under this law, shall cause their clerk, at each term, to certify to the director of revenue the amount so charged against the collector of their county.
(RSMo 1939 § 11324, A.L. 1945 p. 1838) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10096; 1919 § 13086; 1909 § 11638
